PR: fix(test): make test_cache_hits_recorded deterministic with explicit tolerated ranges
https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1184

## Unresolved Copilot review threads

- `test/test_http_instrumentation.py:None` [outdated]

  `allowed_request_urls` is built with the `|` operator against `CACHE_DEPENDENT_REQUEST_URL_RANGES.keys()`. This relies on `dict_keys` set-op behavior (and can also trip static type checkers like mypy/pyright with “unsupported operand types” for `set[str] | dict_keys[str]`). Using `set.union()` (or wrapping the keys in `set(...)`) is clearer and avoids potential CI type-check failures.

---

VERIFY each claim before acting — Copilot is fallible (it once flagged a valid os.getenv(key, default=...) as a bug). If real -> fix + resolve the thread. If wrong -> post a reasoned rebuttal + resolve. Builder -> the-hater -> done; never blindly apply.
